attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.BATCH_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ORDER_NUMBER,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE18,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE19,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE20,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.BOOKED_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.CANCELLED_FLAG,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.CREATED_BY,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.CREATION_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.CUST_PO_NUMBER,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.FOB_POINT_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE,
'CG' GLOBAL_NAME,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.HEADER_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID,
COALESCE(CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID,-999),
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.OPEN_FLAG,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ORDER_CATEGORY_CODE,
COALESCE(CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999),
COALESCE(CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ORDER_TYPE_ID,-999),
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ORDERED_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ORG_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.PARTIAL_SHIPMENTS_ALLOWED,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.PAYMENT_TERM_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.PRICE_LIST_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.PRICING_DATE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
COALESCE(CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID,-999),
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID,
COALESCE(CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID,-999),
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID,
COALESCE(CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID,-999),
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_ID,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.TRANSACTIONAL_CURR_CODE,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE17 ,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13 ,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
/* added as part of Q3FY15 SC-LSS*/
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ORDER_DATE_TYPE_CODE,
/* added as part of Q3FY15 SC-LSS*/
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3,
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_ID /*Added as a part of Q2FY16 Plan*/
FROM 
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
WHERE
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
AND 
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ORDER_NUMBER NOT IN (SELECT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_NRT WHERE SS_CODE IN('BV','QTC'))
AND
NCOU.MOVED_TO_CG1_FLG  = 'Y'      
AND
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' AND CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME < '$$EndLastExtractDate' 
AND
CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
/* AND CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.ORG_ID IN  (SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.CG1_ORD_ID)*/  
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.HEADER_ID ORDER BY CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
